title: Health
description: Live process and dependency probes. Auto-refreshes every {{seconds}} seconds. The probe endpoints themselves ({{live}} {{ready}}) are unauthenticated so they can be scraped by load balancers and uptime monitors.
probe.liveness.title: Liveness
probe.liveness.description: Process is up and serving requests. No external dependencies are checked.
probe.readiness.title: Readiness
probe.readiness.description: All registered dependency checks must report Healthy for the probe to return 200. A 503 here flips the API out of the load-balancer pool.
